title: dasystephana pneumonanthe
intro: Dasystephana pneumonanthe, also known as Lungwort, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Lungwort include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and act as an antibacterial agent. Lungwort can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes used in tincture form, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
